mappings.fas_title: Salaries and Expenses, General Administration, Justice
mappings.reasoning: H.R. 7691 is the Additional Ukraine Supplemental Appropriations Act, 2022. A generic 'Salaries and Expenses' provision under 'Department of Justice' without a sub-bureau qualifier most likely maps to the department-level General Administration S&E account (015-0129). However, there are many DOJ 'Salaries and Expenses' accounts (FBI 015-0200, NSD 015-1300, General Legal Activities 015-0128, etc.), and without seeing the exact bill text hierarchy (which typically specifies the bureau heading), this match is plausible but ambiguous. In the Ukraine supplemental context, NSD (015-1300) for sanctions enforcement or General Legal Activities (015-0128) for war crimes work are also strong candidates.
